title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: Findings: - High: [assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L35) auto-pushes on every detected `git commit`. That is an external publication side effect without explicit approval, and it can push WIP or sensitive commits unintentionally. It also decides “success” by grepping stdout instead of checking the actual tool exit status at [L27](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L27), so failed commits can still fall through. - High: [assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh#L48) masks every `codex exec` failure with `|| true`, then reads `$?` at [L57](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-mini.sh#L57). Result: `EXIT_CODE` is always `0`, so the wrapper reports success even when the remote/local execution failed. - Medium: [assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L712) still keys the implementation cache only by task/tier/project/recipe. Retry feedback is excluded, so attempts 2/3 can reuse stale implementation output at [L718](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L718) instead of incorporating review feedback. - Medium: [assets/skills/note-generate/scripts/note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/note-generate/scripts/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L140) now hard-fails when `HOME` is unset before trying the plain package import path. That regresses otherwise valid environments where `@google/generative-ai` is installed but the process runs with a sanitized env.
